data.content: Shipment review blocked: src/lib/terminal-manager.ts records outcome stats with record.rolledBack = invariantOk after non-zero exits. enforceQueueTerminalInvariant() returns true both when rollback succeeds and when no rollback was needed because the beat already rests in a queue or terminal state, so errored iterations can be logged as rolled back even when nothing was rolled back. That makes the new detailed success-rate log inaccurate for the exact telemetry this beat adds. Existing coverage only asserts the true case and misses the false case.
